[Trump says US to pause operation to guide vessels through Strait of Hormuz"Project Freedom", which began less than 48 hours ago, will be halted because progress has been made toward a deal with Iran, the US president says.55 mins agoWorld](/news/articles/clypekl71gdo)

['Nothing will bring back my son': How 10 minutes of bombing by Israel shattered lives in LebanonThe bombs started falling at 14:15 in the afternoon - bringing chaos and destruction across the country. 4 hrs agoMiddle East](/news/articles/c202652vvnjo)

[Watch: Hundreds of beagles rescued from breeding facility being rehomedAbout 1,500 dogs are being released from a Wisconsin commercial breeder and prepared for adoption after protests from activists.4 hrs agoUS & Canada](/news/videos/c707k7krn99o)

## Highlights

- ### [Iran War Live Updates: Trump Again Shifts U.S. Focus on Strait, Pausing Day-Old Escort Mission](https://www.nytimes.com/live/2026/05/05/world/iran-war-trump-hormuz)
The president made the announcement in a social media post just hours after Secretary of State Marco Rubio had affirmed the newly created mission, which bore little connection to the original justification for war.CreditTierney L. Cross/The New York Times
- ### [Trump Promised Transparency in Venezuela, but Oil Secrets Linger](/2026/05/05/world/trump-venezuela-oil-deals.html)
Trump officials and their Venezuelan allies have promised a new era of accountability to unlock Venezuela’s immense oil wealth. But the country’s oil industry remains a black hole. By Anatoly Kurmanaev and CreditAdriana Loureiro Fernandez for The New York Times
- News Analysis
### [Trump Looks for a Silver Bullet to End the Iran War. There May Be None.](/2026/05/05/world/middleeast/trump-blockade-iran-war.html)
The president is trying to ratchet up the economic pressure on Tehran, but Iran’s government is unlikely to make a deal without a big, face-saving compromise. By Steven ErlangerCreditArash Khamooshi for The New York Times
- ### [A Visitor From the Oort Cloud: Rare Comet Appears in Southern Skies](/2026/05/05/world/australia/comet-oort-cloud-nz-australia-south-africa.html)
Known as C/2025 R3 PANSTARRS, the comet will be visible to stargazers using a telescope in New Zealand, Australia and South Africa. By Laura ChungCreditJosh Aoraki/Te Whatu Stardome

- CreditSahiba Chawdhary/ReutersNews Analysis
- CreditTommy Trenchard for The New York TimesSouth Africa Dispatch
- CreditFinbarr O’Reilly for The New York Times
- CreditBandar Algaloud/Saudi Royal Court
- CreditArilson Almeida/Associated Press

- CreditCnsphoto, via Reuters
- CreditValery Hache/Agence France-Presse — Getty Images
- CreditZain Jaafar/Agence France-Presse — Getty Images
- [‘The Death Zone’: How Russia Is Luring Africans to Ukraine](/2026/05/04/world/africa/ukraine-russia-war-african-soldiers.html)A growing number of men across the continent say they are being promised jobs in Russia, only to be forced into the war. Some go as mercenaries, but many more are drawn unwittingly. By Matthew Mpoke BiggJohn EligonZimasa Matiwane and Ed RamCreditEd Ram for The New York Times
- CreditBilly H.C. Kwok for The New York Times

Advertisement
[SKIP ADVERTISEMENT](#after-mid1)

## [The Global Profile](/column/the-global-profile)
[More in The Global Profile ›](/column/the-global-profile)

- CreditWoohae Cho for The New York Times
- CreditFinbarr O'Reilly for The New York Times
- CreditBradley Secker for The New York Times
- CreditJoao Silva/The New York Times
- CreditBrendan Hoffman for The New York Times

## [Dispatches](/spotlight/dispatches-international)
[More in Dispatches ›](/spotlight/dispatches-international)

- [Norway’s Northern Lights Nightmare](/2026/05/03/world/europe/norway-northern-lights-tromso.html)This Arctic region has seen a boom in tourism, but as tourists chase the northern lights, scammers chase their money. By Lynsey ChutelLouise Krüger and Nicole TungCredit
- CreditSergey Ponomarev for The New York Times
- Credit
- [Raqqa Showcases Syria’s Tumultuous Past](/2026/04/25/world/middleeast/syria-war-raqqa-past.html)The city on the Euphrates, once a cradle of civilization, suffered under a succession of recent rulers. Our visit found it hoping for change. By Carlotta GallHussam Hammoud and Nanna HeitmannCredit
- Credit

Advertisement
[SKIP ADVERTISEMENT](#after-mid2)

## [Read The Times in Spanish](/es/spotlight/read-the-times-in-spanish)
[More in Read The Times in Spanish ›](/es/spotlight/read-the-times-in-spanish)

- Credit
- CreditIlustración de Max-o-matic. Fotografías de Getty Images, Associated Press, Chang W. Lee/The New York Times y Shutterstock.
- [El secretismo sobre los acuerdos petroleros de Venezuela continúa](/es/2026/05/05/espanol/america-latina/acuerdos-petroleros-venezuela.html)Los funcionarios de Trump y sus aliados venezolanos han prometido una nueva era de rendición de cuentas para desbloquear la inmensa riqueza petrolera de Venezuela. Pero la industria petrolera del país sigue siendo un agujero negro. By Anatoly Kurmanaev and Adriana Loureiro FernandezCreditAdriana Loureiro Fernandez for The New York Times
- CreditEraldo Peres/Associated Press
- [‘La zona de la muerte’: cómo Rusia atrae africanos a Ucrania](/es/2026/05/05/espanol/mundo/africanos-rusia-guerra-engano.html)Cada vez más hombres de todo el continente africano se van a Rusia en pos de una promesa de empleo, solo para terminar siendo obligados a participar en la guerra: “Yo luchaba por Rusia. Tenía un uniforme ruso. Pero no era mi lucha”. By Matthew Mpoke BiggJohn EligonZimasa Matiwane and Ed RamCreditEd Ram for The New York Times

- ## [Latest](#stream-panel)
- [Search](#stream-panel)

- TimesVideo[Russia Launches Deadly Attack in Ukraine Ahead of Cease-Fire](/video/world/100000010884624/russia-attack-ukraine-cease-fire.html)Russian forces launched an attack on three Ukrainian cities on Tuesday, killing more than 20 people and injuring dozens of others. The attack came after Russia announced a cease-fire timed to Moscow’s Victory Day celebrations on May 9, commemorating the Soviet victory over the Nazis in World War II.By Alisa Shodiyev Kaff
- [Can Trump Strong-Arm Iran?](/2026/05/05/world/trump-iran-cruise-ship-spain-met-gala.html)The president seems to be searching for a silver bullet to end the war. There might not be one.By Katrin Bennhold

content.text:
🌍 国际新闻精选 🌍
📅 2026年5月6日（星期三）
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📡 BBC精选：

1️⃣ 特朗普宣布暂停霍尔木兹海峡护航行动 "自由计划"启动不到48小时即被叫停，美方称与伊朗的谈判取得进展

2️⃣ 俄军停火前夕发动致命袭击，乌超20人遇难 俄罗斯在5月9日胜利日停火前对三座乌克兰城市发动攻击，造成20多人死亡

3️⃣ 德国莱比锡汽车冲撞人群致2死多伤 一名33岁德国公民被拘留，事件引发欧洲安全关注

4️⃣ 罗马尼亚总理在不信任投票中下台 最大执政联盟政党联合极右翼反对派将总理伊列·博洛扬罢免

5️⃣ 中国湖南烟花工厂爆炸致26死61伤 湖南省一烟花工厂发生爆炸，为近年来最严重工业事故之一
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
📡 纽约时报精选：

6️⃣ 特朗普欲寻"银弹"终结伊朗战争，但可能并不存在 总统试图通过经济施压迫使德黑兰妥协，但伊朗政府若无重大妥协空间不太可能达成协议

7️⃣ 特朗普承诺委内瑞拉石油透明，但秘密交易仍在延续 特朗普团队与委内瑞拉盟友承诺问责新纪元，但该国石油工业仍是"黑洞"

8️⃣ "死亡地带"：俄罗斯如何诱骗非洲人赴乌克兰作战 越来越多非洲男子称被承诺在俄工作，却被强制送入战争前线

9️⃣ 汉坦病毒可能在邮轮乘客间传播，WHO确认2例3人死亡 世界卫生组织警告该罕见人传人病毒在邮轮上出现传播迹象

🔟 奥尔特云来客：罕见彗星现身南半球夜空 C/2025 R3 PANSTARRS彗星可于新西兰、澳大利亚和南非用望远镜观测
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
⚡ AI助手 · 国际视野
